name: Private rented sector energy exemptions register
synonyms: Register a private rented sector energy standards exemption
description: Use this service to register an exemption for a private rented sector property that does not meet the Minimum Energy Efficiency Standards (MEES).
organisation: Department for Energy Security and Net Zero
